feat.name: Hurling Charge
feat.text: You make a ranged Strike with your thrown weapon, Stride, and then Interact to draw another weapon. This Interact action doesn't trigger reactions.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.special: If you are raging and end the Stride adjacent to an enemy, that enemy is off-guard against the next Strike you make against it with the weapon you drew before the end of your next turn.
